descriptions.editors: Editors used by "Edit" / "Open With" in the file browser.
descriptions.data: Back up, restore, and reset your data.

colorTheme.label: Color Theme
colorTheme.desc: Switch between dark and light themes

accentColor.label: Accent Color
accentColor.desc: Used for buttons, links, and active states

interfaceFont.label: Interface Font
interfaceFont.desc: Font for menus, labels, and panels

copyOnSelect.label: Copy on Select
copyOnSelect.desc: Copy highlighted text to the clipboard automatically

pasteButton.label: Paste Button
pasteButton.desc: Mouse button that pastes the clipboard into the terminal

scrollback.label: Scrollback Buffer
scrollback.desc: Number of lines to keep in history (500–100,000)

terminal.changesApplyImmediately: Changes apply to open terminals immediately.

doubleClick.label: Double-click a File
doubleClick.desc: What happens when you double-click a file in the browser

explorer.openFallback: Opening falls back to downloading when no editor is configured (see Editors).

exportBackup.label: Export encrypted backup
exportBackup.desc: Save all hosts, groups, settings, and stored credentials to a single password-protected file.

importBackup.label: Import backup
importBackup.desc: Restore from a backup file. This replaces all current data and restarts Zendo.

clearAll.label: Clear all data
clearAll.desc: Permanently delete every saved host, group, connection history entry, port-forward rule, and S3 connection — along with their stored credentials and all app preferences. Zendo restarts at first-launch state. This can't be undone.

backupModal.exportDesc: Choose a password to encrypt the backup. You'll need it to restore — there's no way to recover the data without it.
backupModal.importDesc: Enter the password this backup was created with. Importing replaces all current data and restarts Zendo.

resetModal.title: Clear all data?
resetModal.desc: This permanently deletes all saved hosts, groups, history, port-forward rules, S3 connections, stored credentials, and preferences. Zendo will restart fresh. This action cannot be undone.
resetModal.failToast: Couldn't clear data. Please try again.

editors.emptyState: No editors configured. Scan for installed editors, or add one manually.
editors.starHint: The starred editor is used by "Edit"; the rest appear under "Open With".
editors.noEditorsFound: No editors found on this computer.
editors.allAlreadyAdded: All detected editors are already added.

editorModal.title: Add Editor
editorModal.name: Name
editorModal.argumentsHint: Use {{placeholder}} where the file should go. If omitted, it's added at the end.

about.title: Zendo
about.desc: A modern desktop client for SSH, SFTP, and S3

autoUpdate.label: Automatic Updates
autoUpdate.desc: Download and install updates in the background, applied on the next launch
